heading: Delete One or More Documents (deleteMany())
body:
You can delete multiple items from a collection using the
[collection.deleteMany()](collection.deleteMany) method.

The following snippet deletes all documents in the `items` collection
that do not have any `reviews`:

```javascript
const query = { "reviews": { "$size": 0 } };

itemsCollection.deleteMany(query)
  .then(result => console.log(`Deleted ${result.deletedCount} item(s).`))
  .catch(err => console.error(`Delete failed with error: ${err}`))
```
